testcase.name: test_developments_no_id_or_mongo_id
testcase.error: tests/test_task2_model_migration.py:45: in admin_session assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","detail":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute. Please try again shortly."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
